commands.review_summary:
The branch updates shared channel typing callbacks to send a final stop after pending starts settle, adds race regression tests, and also changes Copilot SDK option/test fixtures while refreshing the branch.

PR surface: Source +50, Tests +90. Total +140 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main shows cleanup can run before Feishu records typingState, and Feishu stop no-ops until that state exists; I did not run a live Feishu scenario.
